source_rationale: The samples represent all L1 cell types, including CD4 and CD8 T cells, monocytes, dendritic cells, NK cells, and scant B-cells.
The samples represent all L1 cell types, including CD4 and CD8 T cells, monocytes, dendritic cells, NK cells, and scant B-cells.

Heatmap showing the average log2fold changes of the sexually dimorphic genes XIST, KDM4D, UTY, DDX3Y, and USP9Y from differential gene expression analysis of CD4+ T-cells in CSF A, B and C for All samples (FRE, FBS and REC combined), and stratified by FRE, FBS, and REC.
